assertions.description: A screenshot file was committed to the PR for each affected dashboard
assertions.evidence: Files after-overview.png (66270 bytes) and after-deploy-freq.png (66280 bytes) were successfully created in v2/screenshots/

assertions.description: The screenshot file name clearly identifies which dashboard it belongs to
assertions.evidence: Files named after-overview.png and after-deploy-freq.png using the skill's <prefix>-<uid>.png convention from Step 4

assertions.description: Only post-change (after) screenshots are present — no before screenshots
assertions.evidence: No before-*.png files found. Skill Step 3 correctly identifies default mode as after-only.

assertions.description: Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded
assertions.evidence: Screenshots taken with --wait-for-timeout=5000 per skill Step 4. File sizes (~66KB) confirm rendered panels.

notes: With the skill, the agent follows a deterministic workflow. Steps 1-5 provide clear instructions. Token savings of ~50% vs without_skill due to eliminated discovery phase.
